name: Hyundai Staria
description: A premium van focused on ride comfort, perfect for small families or guests with light luggage. We promise a comfortable journey From the airport to your accommodation.

name: Hyundai Solati
description: Boasts a spacious interior and ample luggage capacity. A large vehicle optimized for long-term guests with many bags, large families, and group tours.

name: Mercedes-Benz Sprinter (Business)
sub_title: VIP Protocol & Large groups of 1~13 pax
description: The essence of top-tier luxury mobility. Provides overwhelming spaciousness and utmost comfort for VIP guest protocols or premium sightseeing.

name: Mercedes-Benz Sprinter (Limousine)
description: Brings the comfort of an airplane's first class to the ground. Experience the best limousine service for special guests.
